message:
fix(microsoft365): wire retry loop to retry_config.max_retries

The m365 client had a split retry config: with_retry_config() set
retry_config.max_retries (fixed in 8d3da378) but the actual retry
decision at lines 1114/1127 still read the dead self.max_retries
field. Updated both rate-limit and server-error retry checks.

Verified: 693/693 pass on vmi1227854.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
